items.title: 2Xplat: Two Experts Are Better Than One Generalist
items.abstract: Pose-free feed-forward 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has opened a new frontier for rapid 3D modeling, enabling high-quality Gaussian representations to be generated from uncalibrated multi-view images
